hoe2.name: Terra-Hoe Mk-II
hoe2.desc: Reinforced blade — tills a 3-tile row in one swing.

canister2.name: Canister Mk-II
canister2.desc: Wide nozzle — waters a 3-tile row per squeeze.

drone.name: Irrigation Drone
drone.desc: Place with the Planter on tilled soil. Waters its 3x3 patch every morning (calibrated to skip fussy Prism Pods).

kiln.name: Bio-Kiln
kiln.desc: Place with the Planter on open grass. Slow-roasts crops into artisan goods worth far more.
